title: Repeat monitor or process human reflect result

checks.result: Machine gates 01-07 remain closed; gate 08 remains human-only b4 send --reflect review. No send was run.
A733 RTC remains v1 PATCH 0/7; A733 CCU/PRCM remains PATCH RFC 0/8; A733 pinctrl remains RFC 0/9.

Search found known/background A733 material including U-Boot A733 support, Armbian forum/vendor BSP discussion, linux-sunxi A733 page, and RTC dependency series; no public Linux MMC reply or source-backed SDMMC0 IDMAC descriptor-fetch fix was found.

decision: No new runtime behavior patch and no upstream send action. Continue wait state.
next_action: Repeat monitor or process human H142 reflect-only result. Only queue runtime patch work if new input names a concrete register, reset/clock order, firmware handoff, master ID, binding, or erratum.
